Please welcome former director
of AI Tesla Andre Carpathy. Hello. Wow, a lot of people
here. Hello. , okay. Yeah. So
I'm excited to be here today
to talk to you about software
in the era of AI. And I'm told
that many of you are students
like bachelors, masters, PhD
and so on. And you're about to
enter the industry. And I
think it's actually like an
extremely unique and very
interesting time to enter the
industry right now. And I
think fundamentally the reason
for that is that software is
changing again. And I say
again because I actually gave
this talk already. but the
problem is that software keeps
changing. So I actually have a
lot of material to create new
talks and I think it's
changing quite fundamentally. I think roughly speaking
software has not changed much
on such a fundamental level
for 70 years. And then it's
changed I think about twice
quite rapidly in the last few
years.
